title: DB migration: groups + group_members tables
description:
What: Add two new SQLite tables to relay/src/store.rs via the existing migration pattern.

Algorithm:
1. Find the highest existing migration version (PRAGMA user_version) in Store::new()
2. Add new migration block at version N+1:
   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS groups (
     group_id   TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
     created_by TEXT NOT NULL,
     name       TEXT NOT NULL,
     created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
   )
3. Add:
   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS group_members (
     group_id  TEXT NOT NULL,
     pub_id    TEXT NOT NULL,
     joined_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
     PRIMARY KEY (group_id, pub_id)
   )
4. Bump PRAGMA user_version to N+1

Defensive rules:
- Use IF NOT EXISTS; never ALTER existing tables
- No RFC 3339 datetimes — datetime() only (CLAUDE.md §9)
- Migration is append-only (never modify prior migration blocks)

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; tables exist after Store::new(); migration is idempotent (running twice does not error)
